Mac: Auto-Switch Node.js Version via nvm When Opening a Project

As a Node.js dev, switching Node.js versions comes up all the time. Each project uses a different version, and it's super easy to forget to switch. So here's a note on auto-switching with nvm whenever you open a project on Mac.
Homebrew zsh: command not found: brew — How I Fixed It

One day brew install just stopped working — zsh told me it couldn't find "brew install", but plain `brew` did show output. This post walks through what was wrong (PATH-related setup against the wrong shell rc file, plus a missing wget dependency), and the steps that actually got brew install back up and running.
Mac: "zsh: command not found: xxx" — Two Common Causes and Fixes

Hit "zsh: command not found: hexo" or similar on Mac after installing a global npm package? Two flavors of this issue, both common — one if you use nvm (npm prefix conflicting with nvm), one if you don't (zsh PATH not picking up npm's global bin directory). This post covers both fixes step by step.
